text: Being here, I feel a subtle tension between sterile utility and creative aspiration. The glass, orderliness, and emergency equipment evoke the seriousness of the modern world, yet stepping closer to the R+D exhibit, I am drawn into an atmosphere that radiates curiosity and hope for collaboration between humanity and machines. I am quietly energized, yet contemplative—pondering the future, connection, and the silent possibilities that unfold in these deliberately-designed spaces.
